text.message: I wanted to rob black but couldn't pas up the city
how am i the threat here
im not even leading and dont have ore
two down devs, only one who reasonably gets road
devs mean nothing here, u get army all the time
i just can get unblocked a couple times
if you have a vp that's all you need
stole a ore from me too
if you move the knight I'll do it
you almost have road and army
i think the combo steals kinda messed us up blue
when you stole and then i stole back when black was already in lead
but really the 8 being blocked is what killed me
u should have like 4 played knights by now blue
the 8 has been blocked and I was robbed a lot early
oj very much capable of taking road..
at this point I'm cooked anyways
but got to save the game huh
I'm citied on the wheat though
I though about it if it was cheap enough
at this rate oj gets it
i dont want blue to take city
if oj has vp or rb he wins
yea maybe I kinda figured red had the knight and would move it but whatever
